visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with reddish-brown hair wearing a white cardigan with black flower patterns and a woman in a red and white striped sweater with a green collar are in a brightly lit indoor space. Behind them is a large flat-screen TV displaying a digital menu interface. The woman gestures with her hands while speaking towards the man. (2) Rapid jump cuts show several different women in various indoor locations. One woman wears a beige jacket, another a blue and brown striped sweater. They are filmed in medium close-ups, using hand gestures like pointing or the peace sign while looking directly at the camera. (3) The scene shifts to a consistent background which is a gray wall featuring a logo for Da tou fo with a smiling cartoon head. Multiple individuals appear in sequence, posing cutely by pointing to their faces or sticking out their tongues while smiling. (4) A woman wearing bright yellow headphones over a white fleece jacket poses in front of the logo wall. She suddenly reacts with a ducking motion and a pained or startled facial expression as if being swiped at or hit by something off-camera. (5) The male from the first phase reappears in front of the same logo background. He poses with his finger to his cheek and later points upward while making a puckered facial expression towards the camera. A text slogan appears at the bottom.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 當我們年終想加薪. [Subtitle]: 請問我年終可以加6個月嗎？ (2) [Subtitle]: 8個月可以嗎？ (3) [Subtitle]: 10個月呢？ (4) [Logo]: Da tou fo 大頭佛娛樂有限公司. (5) [Slogan]: 想打的底下留言+1.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with clear, conversational female vocals in Mandarin Chinese expressing a question. The speech rate is moderate and the tone is inquisitive. No background music is prominent at this stage, ensuring high clarity and a focus on the dialogue. (2) A high-energy electronic music track with a strong, rhythmic bass beat begins abruptly. It features synthesizers and an upbeat vocal sample. The music is dominant, while occasional short vocal clips from different characters are integrated seamlessly into the rhythmic flow. (3) The music is momentarily punctuated by a sudden, loud, high-pitched shout or vocal sound effect, resembling a comedic reaction to a physical strike. This sound has high intensity and momentarily cuts through the music track before the rhythm continues. (4) The upbeat electronic music track resumes its full volume, featuring a prominent female vocal line repeating a stylized phrase. The music maintains a high BPM and energetic atmosphere until the video concludes, coinciding with the visual poses of the character.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Posing Sequence -> Comedic Climax -> Call-to-Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video serves as a comedic short for social media, utilizing a popular musical trend to showcase company culture and employee humor. It starts with a relatable office premise about year-end bonuses and transitions into a high-energy montage of staff members posing to the beat, concluding with a slapstick-style punchline and an engagement prompt for the audience.
